gap_in_understanding: The resume path does not state which cwd source wins after handoff, so callers can assume different roots.
suggested_remediation: Document and enforce one cwd precedence rule for resume flows.

gap_in_understanding: Dispatch and restore logic jointly determine cwd behavior but are reviewed as separate surfaces.
suggested_remediation: Create a shared cwd resolution helper and regression tests covering launch, resume, and prompt-file dispatch.

gap_in_understanding: Existing tests demonstrate resume mechanics but do not pin effective cwd under the regression window.
suggested_remediation: Add a regression fixture asserting effective cwd for resumed noninteractive dispatch.
